live_newsroom.title: MLB
live_newsroom.headline: Red Sox Total Gets Weather Check
live_newsroom.snapshot: This is priced close to a toss-up. Bettors should watch late movement because small shifts can reveal where sharper money may be landing. A -114 moneyline implies roughly 53.3% before vig. Boston Red Sox is getting more expensive, which usually points to stronger support or new information behind the favorite. Rain risk can create bullpen stress, delay risk and live-betting volatility.

sections.title: Futures Watch
cards: College Football Futures: Keep the board visible year-round because bettors track long-range prices months before kickoff.
NFL Futures: Watch schedule strength, quarterback health, roster movement and divisional prices.
NBA Futures: Track playoff paths, injury news, rest patterns and championship price movement.
NHL Futures: Watch goalie health, playoff seeding, travel spots and market adjustment.
Soccer Futures: Track title races, promotion/relegation pressure, tournament paths and transfer-window movement.
Tennis/Golf Futures: Draws, form, surface, course fit and injury news can reshape prices quickly.

sections.title: Betting Toolkit
cards: OddsTrader - betting odds, weather, line context, and matchup boards.
OddsTrader MLB Weather - wind, temperature and precipitation context for baseball totals.
The Odds API - structured odds feed for moneylines, spreads, and totals.
Action Network - market movement, betting splits, and injury context.
Covers - matchup pages, odds screens, and trend context.
Sportsbook Review - odds comparison and betting market coverage.

homepage_cards.headline: Red Sox Total Gets Weather Check
homepage_cards.matchup: Philadelphia Phillies at Boston Red Sox
homepage_cards.market_context: Boston Red Sox -114 vs Philadelphia Phillies -105
homepage_cards.line_movement: MOVEMENT: Open -104 -> Current -114 (shortened for Boston Red Sox)
key_data: GAME: Philadelphia Phillies at Boston Red Sox
MARKET: Boston Red Sox favored over Philadelphia Phillies
LINE / ODDS: Boston Red Sox -114 | Philadelphia Phillies -105
IMPLIED PROBABILITY: Boston Red Sox 53.3% before vig
MOVEMENT: Open -104 -> Current -114 (shortened for Boston Red Sox)
SPREAD: Boston Red Sox +1.5 (-193) | Philadelphia Phillies -1.5 (+158)
homepage_cards.why_it_matters: This is priced close to a toss-up. Bettors should watch late movement because small shifts can reveal where sharper money may be landing. A -114 moneyline implies roughly 53.3% before vig. Boston Red Sox is getting more expensive, which usually points to stronger support or new information behind the favorite. Rain risk can create bullpen stress, delay risk and live-betting volatility.
homepage_cards.what_to_watch: Starting pitchers, bullpen availability, posted lineups, weather and late total movement decide whether the number is still playable.

editorial_standard.label: GSR Network Editorial Standard
editorial_standard.text: No gambling advice or picks. Prices, injuries, lineups, weather and fantasy usage are organized for human betting context.
